parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { run_id: $execution.id, now_iso: new Date().toISOString(), task_limit: 25, workflow_version: 'followup_dispatcher_v1' } }];

parameters.filterString: ={{ 'id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.conversation_id) + '&org_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.org_id) }}
={{ 'id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.contact_id || '') + '&org_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.org_id) }}

={{ 'conversation_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.conversation_id) + '&org_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.org_id) + '&direction=eq.inbound&sender_type=eq.customer&order=created_at.desc' }}

={{ 'org_id=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.org_id) + '&platform=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Interpret Claim Result').item.json.platform) + '&is_active=eq.true&order=created_at.asc' }}
